zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Stanley於1431年5月1日出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯坦利時，她的父親Thomas Stanley25歲，母親Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley29歲。她於大約1447年與John Savage在英國爾克里夫頓結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年11月22日在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Stanley于1431年5月1日出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯坦利时，她的父亲Thomas Stanley25岁，母亲Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley29岁。她于大约1447年与John Savage在英国爾克里夫頓结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年11月22日在英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Stanley was born on 1 May 1431, in Stanley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Stanley, was 25 and her mother, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, was 29. She married John Savage about 1447, in Clifton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 November 1498, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Stanley est née le 1 mai 1431, à Stanley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Stanley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé John Savage environ 1447, à Clifton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1498, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Mai 1431 in Stanley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Stanley 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley 29. Sie hat um 1447 in Clifton, Cheshire, England John Savage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. November 1498 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Stanleyが1431年5月1日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアスタンリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Stanleyは25歳，母Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanleyは29歳であった。約1447年にイギリスチェシュアイアクリフトンでJohn Savageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年11月22日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Macclesfield Forest with Wildboarclough,: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이 맥클스필드 포레스트 위스 윌드보르c루그h
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Stanley(이)가 1431년 5월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 스탠리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Stanley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1447년 영국 체실르 클리프턴에서 John Savage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 11월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Stanley nasceu em 1 de maio de 1431, em Stanley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Stanley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com John Savage aproximadamente 1447, em Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1498, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Stanley родилась 1 мая 1431 г. в местности стэнли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Stanley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Savage около 1447 г. в местности клифтон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 ноября 1498 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
